name: SCP-3008 RP
description:
Welcome, all of you nerds that wanted this so badly. This is my 10K message special for my SCP RP bot, and it is about SCP-3008, the Infinite IKEA!

Please realize that I am a small-time bot maker. There will be small edits and updates every once in a while, but not very often.

Have fun, y’all! Happy Holidays! :D
creator: CHILDHOOD_HAS_PASSED
